zh.lifeSummary: 當Guillemette de La Mestre De Tinière de Chapoulie於1270年1月8日出生在法國阿奎泰道多培利納可時，她的父親Pierre DE THINIERES40歲，母親Marie DE LA CHABANNES41歲。她於1288年與Guillaume Ier ROGIER de BEAUFORT在法國豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德博福特結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和7個女兒的父母。她去世於1338年6月23日在法國努維勒-阿吉泰可雷洛希艾斯-達艾格萊頓斯享年68歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Guillemette de La Mestre De Tinière de Chapoulie于1270年1月8日出生在法国阿奎泰道多培利納可时，她的父亲Pierre DE THINIERES40岁，母亲Marie DE LA CHABANNES41岁。她于1288年与Guillaume Ier ROGIER de BEAUFORT在法国豪-德-福朗斯諾爾德博福特结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和7个女儿的父母。她去世于1338年6月23日在法国努維勒-阿吉泰可雷洛希艾斯-達艾格萊頓斯享年68岁。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.
Indian: variant of   Dey  .

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: La
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.
Chinese:

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Mestre
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Spanish Jorge, Jose, Rolando, Carlos, Juan, Octavio, Alberto, Francisco, Alvaro, Ana, Arsenio, Cesar.  Portuguese Amadeu.
Catalan, southern French, and Portuguese: from mestre ‘master (craftsman)’, denoting the head of a craft or trade guild. Compare French Maitre .
Italian and Jewish (from Italy): habitational name from Mestre, part of Venice.

variants.name: Maitre
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Edouard, Jacques, Marie Josette, Philippe, Pierre, Raoul, Veronique.  German Juergen, Klaus, Ulrich.
French (Maître): occupational name for the head of a craft or trade guild, from Old French maistre ‘master’ (from Latin magister). Compare Lemaitre .

nameMeanings.name: Guillemette
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Andre, Normand, Armand, Gilles, Jean-Paul, Leonie, Alcide, Anatole, Cecile, Emile, Fernand, Fernande.

Americanized form of French Guillemet: from a derivative of the personal name Guillaume . Altered ending reflects the Canadian and American French practice of sounding the final -t. Compare Guilmette .
French: from Guillemette, a female personal name derived from Guillaume .

variants.name: Guilmette
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  French Armand, Edmour, Andre, Antoine, Cecile, Emile.
Altered form of American French   Guillemette  .

variants.name: Guillaume
meanings: Germanic. See William .

en.lifeSummary: When Guillemette de La Mestre De Tinière de Chapoulie was born on 8 January 1270, in Peyrignac, Dordogne, Aquitaine, France, her father, Pierre DE THINIERES, was 40 and her mother, Marie DE LA CHABANNES, was 41. She married Guillaume Ier ROGIER de BEAUFORT in 1288, in Beaufort, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 7 daughters. She died on 23 June 1338, in Rosiers-d'Égletons, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, at the age of 68.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Guillemette de La Mestre De Tinière de Chapoulie est née le 8 janvier 1270, à Peyrignac, Dordogne, Aquitaine, France, son père, Pierre DE THINIERES, avait 40 ans et sa mère, Marie DE LA CHABANNES, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé Guillaume Ier ROGIER de BEAUFORT en 1288, à Beaufort, Nord, Hauts-de-France, France. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 7 filles. Elle est décédée le 23 juin 1338, à Rosiers-d'Égletons, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, France, à l’âge de 68 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Guillemette de La Mestre De Tinière de Chapoulie am 8. Januar 1270 in Peyrignac, Dordogne, Aquitaine, Frankreich geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Pierre DE THINIERES 40 und ihre Mutter Marie DE LA CHABANNES 41. Sie hat 1288 in Beaufort, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Frankreich Guillaume Ier ROGIER de BEAUFORT geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 7 Töchter. Sie starb am 23. Juni 1338 im Alter von 68 Jahren in Rosiers-d'Égletons, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Frankreich.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Guillemette de La Mestre De Tinière de Chapoulie è nata il il 8 gennaio 1270 nel Peyrignac, Dordogne, Aquitaine, Francia, sua padre, Pierre DE THINIERES, aveva 40 anni e sua madre, Marie DE LA CHABANNES, aveva 41 anni. Lei sposato Guillaume Ier ROGIER de BEAUFORT nel 1288, nel Beaufort, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 7 figlie. Morì il 23 giugno 1338, nel Rosiers-d'Égletons, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, all'età di 68 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Guillemette de La Mestre De Tinière de Chapoulieが1270年1月8日にフランスアクイティアインドールドグンペイリグナックで生まれた時，父Pierre DE THINIERESは40歳，母Marie DE LA CHABANNESは41歳であった。1288年にフランスハウトス-デ-フランスノードビーウフォートでGuillaume Ier ROGIER de BEAUFORTと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と7人の娘の親であった。彼女は1338年6月23日にフランスノウベレ-アクイティアインコルeズロシエルス-ド'eグレトンスで68歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Guillemette de La Mestre De Tinière de Chapoulie(이)가 1270년 1월 8일 프랑스 아키테인 도르도그니 피리그나크에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Pierre DE THINIERES(은)는 40세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Marie DE LA CHABANNES(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 1288년 프랑스 하츠-데-프랜스 노르드 보포트에서 Guillaume Ier ROGIER de BEAUFORT(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 일곱 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1338년 6월 23일 프랑스 노우벨레-아키테인 코e즈 로시어스-드'e글레토스에서 68세의 나이로 사망했다.

mn.8 janvier 1270–23 juin 1338: 1270 оны Нэгдүгээр сарын 8–1338 оны Зургаадугаар сарын 23

pt.8 janvier 1270–23 juin 1338: 8 de janeiro de 1270–23 de junho de 1338
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Guillemette de La Mestre De Tinière de Chapoulie nasceu em 8 de janeiro de 1270, em Peyrignac, Dordogne, Aquitaine, França, seu pai, Pierre DE THINIERES, tinha 40 anos e sua mãe, Marie DE LA CHABANNES, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com Guillaume Ier ROGIER de BEAUFORT em 1288, em Beaufort, Nord, Hauts-de-France, França. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 7 filhas. Ela faleceu em 23 de junho de 1338, em Rosiers-d'Égletons, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, França, com 68 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Guillemette de La Mestre De Tinière de Chapoulie родилась 8 января 1270 г. в местности пиригнак, дордогн, аквитеин, Франция, её отцу по имени Pierre DE THINIERES было 40 лет, а матери, которую звали Marie DE LA CHABANNES, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Guillaume Ier ROGIER de BEAUFORT в 1288 г. в местности бофорт, норд, хауц-де-фрэнс, Франция. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 7 дочерей. Она умерла 23 июня 1338 г. в местности росиирс-д'eглетонс, коррeз, ноувелле-аквитеин, Франция в возрасте 68 лет.

es.8 janvier 1270–23 juin 1338: 8 de enero de 1270–23 de junio de 1338
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Guillemette de La Mestre De Tinière de Chapoulie nació el 8 de enero de 1270, en Peyrignac, Dordogne, Aquitaine, Francia, su papá, Pierre DE THINIERES, tenía 40 años y su mamá, Marie DE LA CHABANNES, tenía 41 años. Se casó con Guillaume Ier ROGIER de BEAUFORT en 1288, en Beaufort, Nord, Hauts-de-France, Francia. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 7 hijas. Murió el 23 de junio de 1338, en Rosiers-d'Égletons, Corrèze, Nouvelle-Aquitaine, Francia, a la edad de 68 años.
